name: Omnifex Convergence
descriptionTemplate: This turn, self Command Cards' Final DMG +15%. Gain [Arg1] Keyflare. Present 5 Skill Cards from the current Realm, choose to {Discover} up to 3 of them, and make them Tawil's cards with {Exhaust} and {Retain}. The next Tawil's Command Card played activates 2 times.

patch.descriptionTemplate: This turn, self Command Cards' Final DMG +15%. Gain [Arg1] Keyflare. Present 5 Skill Cards from the current Realm, choose to {Discover} up to 3 of them, and make them Tawil's cards with {Exhaust}, {Prepare 1}, and {Retain}. The next Tawil's Command Card played activates 2 times.
